overall.description: First-person perspective walking along an unlit dirt trail at night, illuminated by a headlamp or handheld flashlight. The surroundings are pitch black with grass and vegetation visible on both sides, and a fence line appears on the right as the path progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: unlit rural trail with fence line on right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a forward-facing light source

tall grass and vegetation lining the left side of the trail
tall grass and vegetation lining the right side of the trail
vertical fence posts visible on the right side, becoming more prominent as the camera advances
pitch black distant tree line or hills against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail in complete darkness, illuminated only by a warm artificial light source. Tall grass lines both sides of the path, while vertical fence posts emerge from the darkness on the right side as the trail progresses. The surroundings remain pitch black beyond the reach of the light, creating an enclosed, isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from an open path into a more structured corridor of darkness. It begins with a steady advance through pitch black surroundings, where a warm artificial light source carves a limited path through the void. As the camera progresses, the tall grass lining both sides of the trail remains constant, while vertical fence posts gradually emerge from the shadows on the right. The scene then tightens as the light reveals the repetitive rhythm of the fence line, further enclosing the isolated atmosphere before the path continues deeper into the night.
